post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 237 - Matrix Mafia

The Matrix is a computer-generated dream world designed to keep humans under control. Humans are kept sedated, effectively living a virtual life. However, a group of humans from the City of Zion are attempting to defeat the programs and destroy the Matrix to free the human race from their mechanical overlords. The Architect has made the Matrix run many times. However, there is a glitch, an anomaly in his program that he has never been able to eliminate that could threaten the very existence of the Matrix. He and his Agents are trying to keep the Matrix running smoothly and the humans in subordination. Unbeknownst to both sides, the exile program, Agent Smith, a virus, is also jeopardizing the survival of both humanity and the Matrix by taking control of every entity he meets.

Alive (9/13)
  1. mathjay
  2. Scipio1
  3. BobDBuilder321 NDMath
  4. rosecasket violetmx12
  5. kevinmathz
  6. ad333
  7. meepster Ridley-C
  8. Osmium_
  9. RadioActive1729 ostriches88


Dead (4)
  • juliankuang, Cypher, also known as The Mafia Roleblocker was hung Day 1.
  • vietaformula810, An Agent, also known as A Mafia Goon has been killed Night 1.
  • avanders, The Architect, also known as The Mafia Godfather was hung Day 2.
  • snoozingnewt, Neo, also known as The Town Doctor has been killed Night 2.


Rules
Votes and Activity Checks
  • Vote in the exact form of Vote: [player name] where [player name] is the username of the player you wish to vote. Post Unvote if you wish to unvote. Post Vote: No Hang if you want to no hang. You do not need to unvote to vote again. An invalid vote will not be counted.
  • This game is majority hang. If a player is voted by the majority of living players, then that player will be hanged immediately. If No Hang is voted by half of living players, a No Hang will occur. If majority is not reached, no one is hanged.
  • Activity checks and Votecounts will be performed whenever necessary. If you are inactive for 2 days, you will receive an In Game Prod. If you are inactive for another 2 days, you will receive a PM Prod. If you are inactive for another 2 days after that, you will be replaced.
  • If you know that you will be gone for more than 48 hours, message me, RTG, or HannahW, my comod, the dates of your V/LA. I will then determine if your V/LA is for a suitable amount of time. If your V/LA is for 7 days or more, you will be replaced, however, any shorter should be fine.

Posting and Communications
  • The only messages that the mod, RTG, or comod, HannahW, will be sure to receive will be ones posted in bold. Therefore, if you want to communicate with the mod or comod, make sure to post in bold.
  • Do not quote any PM's from the mod or comod or pretend to quote any. These are personal messages and are not meant for anyone else. This will result in a modkill or force replacement.
  • Do not discuss anything with anyone outside of the thread unless the mod or comod give you permission. This will result in an immediate modkill or force replacement.
  • Do not edit or delete posts in thread. Depending on the severity of this offence, this may result in a warning or a modkill.
  • If you have read all the rules, in your first post, use the code formatting provided by AoPS in at least a portion of your post.
  • When you are dead, you may no longer communicate in thread or in a quick topic if you have one.
  • Do not post in the thread during the night, or in your quick topic during the day.
  • This colour will be used for anything flavour related. Green will be used for anything town related. Red will be used for anything Mafia Related. Purple will be used for anything Serial Killer related. Blue will be used for Votecounts/Activity Checks. Do not use any of these colours.
  • Do not use anything that conceals text other than a hide tag.

Miscellaneous
  • Days will last 3 weeks. Night will last 4 days.
  • Do not mention ongoing games.
  • Night actions must be messaged to the mod or comod or posted in a Quick Topic.
  • Always play towards your win condition.
  • Be mature. Do not use offensive language. Do not make any personal attacks.
  • Use your best judgement.
  • Have fun.
  • Read all the rules and mod comments.
  • Warnings will be given for not following rules unless modkill level rules are broken. Everyone will have 3 warnings before they will face a modkill.


Setup
This game uses the C9++ setup, which can only be fully explained by this page.


Role PMs
Vanilla Townie wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name], you are a Resident of Zion also known as a Vanilla Townie.

You have no abilities other than your voice and your vote.

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Town Cop wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name], you are the Oracle, also known as the Town Cop.

You are a sapient program integral to the very nature of the Matrix. You have the power of foresight, which you use to advise and guide humans attempting to fight the Matrix. Each night phase, you may target one player in the game to investigate them. You will receive a result of "Town", "Anti-town", or "No Result".

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Town 1-Shot Cop wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name], you are Morpheus, also known as the Town 1-Shot Cop.

You are the Captain of the Nebuchadnezzar. When you visited the Oracle, she said you would find the One. Once, at night, you may target one player in the game to investigate them. You will receive a result of "Town", "Anti-town", or "No Result".

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Town Doctor wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name], you are Neo also known as the Town Doctor.

You are the most powerful person in the Matrix. You are able to stop bullets, move at incredulous speeds, fly, and even heal people with fatal wounds. Each night phase, you may target one player in the game to heal them. They will be protected from a kill. You may not target yourself.

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Town 1-Shot Doctor wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name], you are Trinity, also known as the Town 1-Shot Doctor.

The Oracle told you that you would fall in love with the One. You fell in love with Neo, and it looked like he had died, but you told him that, bringing him back to life to defeat the Agents in the Matrix. Once, at night, you may target one player in the game to heal them. They will be protected from a kill. You may not target yourself.

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Town Vigilante wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name], you Niobe also known as the Town Vigilante.

You are one of the most gifted martial artists in the Matrix. You have killed at least one agent, survived multiple encounters with the Merovingians super thugs, faced Seraph in one on one combat, and even managed to survive and escape from a confrontation with Agent Smith. Each night phase, you may target another player in the game to attempt to kill them.

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Town 1-Shot Vigilante wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name], you are an EMP also known as a Town 1-Shot Vigilante.

You are a very useful tool to the people of Zion. You can take out anything electrical within a large radius and are one of the few ways to defeat the machines guarding the Matrix. Once, at night, you may target another player in the game to attempt to kill them.

You win if all threats to the town are eliminated and at least one town-aligned player is alive.
Town Innocent Child wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name], you are the Keymaker also known as the Town Innocent Child.

You are a program created to open up the door to the Source for the One. On Day 1, you will be publicly confirmed to be town.

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Town Mason wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name], you are Tank also known as a Town Mason along with your partner(s) [Player Name] (and [Player Name]).

You, Dozer, and Zee are all siblings who are naturally born humans into Zion. You, [Player1], and [Player2] all know each other to be town. During the first 24 hours of Day 1 and during the night, you may talk to them here [Link].

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Town Roleblocker wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name], you are Seraph, also known as the Town Roleblocker.

You used to work for the Merovingian, until the Oracle approached you and asked you to protect her. Each night phase, you may target another player in the game to attempt to block them from performing any night actions.
Win condition:

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Town 1-Shot Roleblocker wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name], you are Persephone, also known as the Town 1-Shot Roleblocker.

You are the neglected wife of the Merovingian, but also an exile program from an older version of the Matrix. Therefore, you have decided to help the cause of the humans once to get the Keymaker and meet the Architect. Once, at night, you may target another player in the game to attempt to block them from performing any night actions.

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Mafia Goon wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name]. You are an Agent, also known as a Mafia Goon, along with your partner(s), [Player Name] (and [Player Name]).

You are a sentient security/eradication program created within the Source whose primary function is to eliminate anyone or anything that could reveal the truth of the Matrix to its inhabitants. Each night phase, you may talk to your group here [Link]. Each night phase, you may send a member of your group to target another player in the game, attempting to kill them.

You win when the Mafia obtain a majority or nothing can prevent this from occurring.
Mafia Roleblocker wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name]. You are Cypher, also known as the Mafia Roleblocker, along with your partner(s), [Player Name] (and [Player Name]).

You are a member of the crew of the Nebuchadnezzar. However, you have had enough of the real world and want to live peacefully in the Matrix again, so you betrayed the people of the Nebuchadnezzar when you could aiding Agents to take them down. Each night phase, you may talk to your group here [Link]. Each night phase, you may send a member of your group to target another player in the game, attempting to kill them. Each night phase, you may target another player in the game to attempt to block them from performing any night actions. You may not both Roleblock and Kill on the same night.

You win when the Mafia obtain a majority or nothing can prevent this from occurring.
Mafia Godfather wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name]. You are the Architect, also known as the Mafia Godfather, along with your partner(s), [Player Name] (and [Player Name]).

You are a highly specialized program of the machine world as well as the creator of the Matrix. Your function is to be the administrator of the system and keep the Matrix, your creation, running smoothly. Each night phase, you may talk to your group here [Link]. Each night phase, you may send a member of your group to target another player in the game, attempting to kill them. You will appear as innocent to any alignment checks.

You win when the Mafia obtain a majority or nothing can prevent this from occurring.
Serial Killer wrote:
Welcome, [Player Name]. You are Agent Smith, also known as the Serial Killer.

You were an Agent of the Matrix; however, you were destroyed by Neo and became an exile program and manifested as a computer virus trying to destroy the Matrix and humans alike. You are both Investigation Immune and 1-shot Bulletproof. Each night phase, you may target another player in the game to attempt to kill them.

You win when you are the last player alive or nothing can prevent this from occurring.


Moderators
I, RTG, am the game mod.
HannahW is my comod.
If you have any questions message one or both of us.


Warnings
Yay, you guys are awesome this is empty.


Votecount 1.0 Beginning of Time Votecount

Not Voting (13): mathjay, Scipio1, BobDBuilder321, vietaformula810, rosecasket, kevinmathz, juliankuang, ad333, avanders, snoozingnewt, meepster, Osmium_, RadioActive1729

With 13 alive, it takes 7 to hang.

post_canonical:
Math time!

For the Ms, we either have MMM or M since I'm an inno child.

MMM = $\binom{7}{3} \cdot \frac{1}{10^3} \cdot \frac{9^4}{10^4} = \frac{229635}{10^7}$
M = $\binom{7}{1} \cdot \frac{1}{10} \cdot \frac{9^6}{10^6} = \frac{3720087}{10^7}$

Therefore, there is a $$\frac{\frac{3720087}{10^7}}{\frac{3720087}{10^7}+\frac{229635}{10^7}} = \frac{3720087}{3720087+229635} = \frac{3720087}{3949722} = \boxed{94.18\%}$$ chance that there are no masons and the M section is one M. That chance is high enough such that we can trust that there is exactly one M.

BobDBuilder321 wrote:
I should probably get this out of the way before someone cop checks me so:

Hardclaim: 1sbp Miller Vig

Bob is a 1SBP SK. There's no such thing as a miller in C9++, and the vig role only has one possible modifier: 1-shot.

If he was investigation immune, he wouldn't claim miller, and he only claimed 1SBP in case there was a town vig.

I don't think anything is wrong with this logic mechanically, other than the fact that bob should've read the setup page better.

Vote: BobDBuilder321

post_rendered:
setup
The moderator randomly chooses 7 numbers from 1-100, repeating permitted. Then, each number is turned into a letter as follows:
1-50 = T (Townie. This actually directly influences scum powerroles.)
51-65 = C (Cop)
66-75 = D (Doctor)
76-85 = V (Vigilante)
86-95 = M (Mason)
96-100 = B (Blocker)
The mod then notes how many of each letter is generated

Powerroles are inserted into the setup depending on how many of each letter are generated. For example, when looking at the "C" list, look at how many Cs you received. If you get no Cs, do not add any roles from the C list (exception: "T" list has a set of roles to be added if 0 Ts are generated). If you get three Cs, look at where it says CCC and add the corresponding powerroles into the game. In this case, add a Cop and a 1-Shot Cop.
Cop Roles
C = 1-Shot Cop
CC = Cop
CCC = Cop, 1-Shot Cop
CCCC = 2 Cops
CCCCC = 2 Cops, 1-Shot Cop
CCCCCC = 3 Cops
Cops are guaranteed to be sane

Doctor Roles
D = Doctor
DD = Doctor + 1-Shot Doctor
DDD = 2 Doctors
DDDD = 2 Doctors + 1-Shot Doctor
DDDDD = 3 Doctors

Vigilante Roles
V = 1-Shot Vigilante
VV = Vigilante
VVV = Vigilante, 1-Shot Vigilante
VVVV = 2 Vigilantes
VVVVV = 2 Vigilantes, 1-Shot Vigilante

Mason Roles
M = Innocent Child (Confirmed at start of Day 1 by mod)
MM = 2 Masons
MMM = 2 Masons + Innocent Child
MMMM = 3 Masons
MMMMM = 2 Masons + 2 Masons (i.e. two separate pairings)

Blocker Roles
B = Roleblocker
BB = Roleblocker + 1-Shot Roleblocker
BBB = 2 Roleblockers
BBBB = 2 Roleblockers + 1-Shot Roleblocker

Scum Roles
TTTTTTT = Goon + Godfather, Serial Killer (Investigation Immune OR 1-Shot Bulletproof)
TTTTTT = Goon + Godfather
TTTTT = Goon + Godfather, Serial Killer (Investigation Immune OR 1-Shot Bulletproof)
TTTT = 2 Goons + Roleblocker
TTT = 2 Goons + Roleblocker, Serial Killer (Investigation Immune OR 1-Shot Bulletproof)
TT = Goon + Roleblocker + Godfather
T = Goon + Roleblocker + Godfather, Serial Killer (Investigation Immune OR 1-Shot Bulletproof)
0 Ts = Goon + Roleblocker + Godfather

Serial Killer chooses its ability pregame
Then add VT's until 13 players

The crew of the Nebuchadnezzar had entered the Matrix to go find the Oracle so she could talk to Neo. However, on their way back to the ship they noticed something was off. Neo had noticed a black cat running across a hallway, and then another one do the exact same thing. Deja Vu. However, it wasn't another cat, it was the same one. Agents had changed something about the Matrix. The crew of the Nebuchadnezzar rushed to their exit point, but it was blocked off. They had to run away, but not before Morpheus was taken prisoner by the Agents. They had been betrayed, but by who? There were only 3 people that could have done that on board the Nebuchadnezzar: Tank, Dozer, and Cypher. The crew realized that the only one that had anything to gain from betraying them was Cypher, who had cut a deal with the Agents to plug him back into the Matrix, because he couldn't deal with living in the cold real world that now existed. The crew realized that and executed Cypher, also known as juliankuang.

post_rendered:
For people who commented after my flavour to end day 1, the flavour has nothing to do with the people or roles in the game. It is just an adaptation from different scenes in the Matrix movies as is this next one, based off my favourite fight scene in the entire trilogy.

Neo and several other residents of Zion are having a meeting in the Matrix. However, part way through the residents guarding are met with a knock on the door. One resident opens a slate in the door.

The masked figure states, "I'm looking for Neo."
"Never heard of him," the resident replies in return.
"I have something for him...a gift. You see he set me free." The figure slides an envelope through the slate.
The resident takes the envelope replying, "Fine whatever. Now piss off!"

Neo comes through the hallway and asks, "Who was that?"
"He gave you this."

Neo rips open the envelope and a communication device from An Agent slips out into his hand. He knows exactly where it comes from. The meeting has been compromised and now everyone is in danger.

"Is everything alright sir?" the resident inquires.
"The meeting's over. Retreat to your exits, Agents are coming!" Neo orders.

Right as he says that, something hammers at the metal door. Multiple hits follow. The fifth hit knocks the door in. Three Agents walk through.

"Hi, you fellas."
The Agents stop.
"It's him"
"The Anomaly"
"Do we proceed?"
"Yes"
"He is still"
"Only human"

The first Agent takes a step forward to try and hit Neo, but he fights him off easily. The other two Agents join in and Neo fights off all three of them relatively easily. He takes a step outside to see if he can find the person who gave him the Agent communication device. Only one thing is certain, someone, who is not him, has killed an Agent. Whether that was Niobe, an EMP, or Agent Smith remains to be seen.

vietaformula810 Has Been Killed. He Was An Agent, Also Known As A Mafia Goon.

Neo and several other residents of Zion are having a meeting in the Matrix. However, part way through the residents guarding are met with a knock on the door. One resident opens a slate in the door.

The masked figure states, "I'm looking for Neo."
"Never heard of him," the resident replies in return.
"I have something for him...a gift. You see he set me free." The figure slides an envelope through the slate.
The resident takes the envelope replying, "Fine whatever. Now piss off!"

Neo comes through the hallway and asks, "Who was that?"
"He gave you this."

Neo rips open the envelope and a communication device from An Agent slips out into his hand. He knows exactly where it comes from. The meeting has been compromised and now everyone is in danger.

"Is everything alright sir?" the resident inquires.
"The meeting's over. Retreat to your exits, Agents are coming!" Neo orders.

Right as he says that, something hammers at the metal door. Multiple hits follow. The fifth hit knocks the door in. Three Agents walk through.

"Hi, you fellas."
The Agents stop.
"It's him"
"The Anomaly"
"Do we proceed?"
"Yes"
"He is still"
"Only human"

The first Agent takes a step forward to try and hit Neo, but he fights him off easily. The other two Agents join in and Neo fights off all three of them relatively easily. He takes a step outside to see if he can find the person who gave him the Agent communication device. Only one thing is certain, someone, who is not him, has killed an Agent. Whether that was Niobe, an EMP, or Agent Smith remains to be seen.

vietaformula810 Has Been Killed. He Was An Agent, Also Known As A Mafia Goon.

Scipio — Made an incorrect claim about mafia in terms of setup at the beginning, I don’t think this is fakable, nor is it a scumslip. Hit Julian right in his first vote, dang. All I can summarize his posts with is WiM.
ND(Bob) — One of the first to express suspicion against Julian. Contributed heavily early game, overall helpful to town. Flipped innocent but we could have a godfather or invest immune SK. Julian SLed him before he started bussing, and during this time period, he seemed to be directing attention onto others, iirc Adra before her claim. I would not consider his interactions with scum as mafia/mafia, I would lean to SK. Suggested rose as SK/anti-town for not much solid reason compared to his previous reads afaik, and tried to shift the hang to her solely on the basis that she might have been SK until the claim and also suggested her cop claim could have been faked. Hit both nails on the head exceedingly well though.
ad — FoSed vieta at the beginning and Julian voted him back, pushing it. Believes in rose’s claim despite suspicion against her. Then defended vieta as well, to which vieta soft-refused. To me, this looks like challenging sheeping; throughout the game he’s been a stickler for having evidence on scumreads/townreads.
avanders — Took the time to analyze Bob’s troll claim at the start. Vieta bandwagoned. Julian did as well. Suggested cop investigate Bob even though SK can be invest-immuned. WIFOM but FOS. Expressed worry about Julian flipping town after RTG announced the hang but logic seemed towny because we were also looking at vieta and forgot about meepers. Contributed in #1241. I am too tired to use any critical thinking whatsoever right now but I did not like their #1302 suggestion to PL Osmium, it seems TWTBAW which aligns with their other actions.
snoozingnewt — Occasional fluff/complaining about the game. More fluff. Jumped right onto the vieta bandwagon but is open and honest about his lurking.

I have not looked into metas yet. Julian may have cleared these three in this post? He bussed vieta afterwards, though, so he could just be directing attention away from himself.

Sorry if there are any grammatical errors– brain is really fried.

The following flavour is from the climax of the first Matrix movie here. For anyone who hasn't seen The Matrix before I highly recommend watching that movie. One of the best of all time.

Agents have chased Neo into an apartment building. Neo is trying to find a land line to escape the Matrix.
He rushes in to one of the apartments, however as he opens the door, an Agent is standing at the door and unloads a full clip from his handgun into Neo's chest. Neo falls to the floor.

"Check Him," motioning to another Agent who has just walked in.

"He's gone."

"Goodbye, Mr. Andersen," the first Agent mutters.

The Agents walk away. The hope for the human race and the people of Zion is lost. However, suddenly, Neo comes to and stands up. The Agents turn around, visibly shocked. They all raise their guns and fire full clips towards Neo.

"No," Neo says putting his hand up towards the bullets.

The bullets suddenly start slowing down as they come close to Neo and stop right in front of him. He picks one of them up, inspects it, then drops it and all the other bullets fall to the ground as well. An Agent runs towards Neo throwing punches, but Neo realizes he's no match for him anymore.
Everything has seemingly slowed down in the Matrix. The Agents can't stop him. He has taken over The Architect's matrix.

He is the one.

avanders Has Been Hung. He Was The Architect, Also Known As The Mafia Godfather.

The following flavour is from the climax of the first Matrix movie [url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Vy7RaQUmOzE&ab_channel=IconicClips]here[/url].  For anyone who hasn't seen The Matrix before I highly recommend watching that movie.  One of the best of all time.

[color=#008f11][color=#f00]Agents[/color] have chased [color=#0f0]Neo[/color] into an apartment building.  [color=#0f0]Neo[/color] is trying to find a land line to escape the Matrix. 
 He rushes in to one of the apartments, however as he opens the door, an [color=#f00]Agent[/color] is standing at the door and unloads a full clip from his handgun into [color=#0f0]Neo's[/color] chest.  [color=#0f0]Neo[/color] falls to the floor.

[color=#f00]"Check Him," [/color]motioning to another [color=#f00]Agent[/color] who has just walked in.

[color=#f00]"He's gone."[/color]

[color=#f00]"Goodbye, Mr. Andersen,"[/color] the first [color=#f00]Agent[/color] mutters.

The [color=#f00]Agents[/color] walk away.  The hope for the human race and the people of Zion is lost.  However, suddenly, [color=#0f0]Neo[/color] comes to and stands up.  The [color=#f00]Agents[/color] turn around, visibly shocked.  They all raise their guns and fire full clips towards [color=#0f0]Neo[/color].

[color=#0f0]"No," Neo[/color] says putting his hand up towards the bullets.

The bullets suddenly start slowing down as they come close to [color=#0f0]Neo[/color] and stop right in front of him.  He picks one of them up, inspects it, then drops it and all the other bullets fall to the ground as well.  An [color=#f00]Agent[/color] runs towards [color=#0f0]Neo[/color] throwing punches, but Neo realizes he's no match for him anymore. 
 Everything has seemingly slowed down in the Matrix.  The [color=#f00]Agents[/color] can't stop him.  He has taken over [color=#f00]The Architect's[/color] matrix.

He is the one.[/color]

post_rendered:
Neo has plugged himself into the Matrix for a final time to take out the virus Smith. By this time Smith has fully taken over every entity in the Matrix. As Neo walks towards the middle of the square Smith clones line up on both sides of the street and in the windows of the buildings just staring at him. From one side of the street, a Smith walks out to the middle of the street.

"Mr. Anderson, welcome back. We've missed you," Smith sneers.

"You like what I've done with the place?"

"It ends tonight," Neo replies.

"I know it does, I've seen it. That's why the rest of me is just going to enjoy the show cause we already know that I'm the one who beats you."

Both of them clench their fists and run at each other. They fight until Smith feeds Neo a punch that floors him and makes him have to catch his breath.

"Can you feel it Mr. Anderson? Closing in on you? Oh I can. I really should thank you for it after all it was your life that taught me the purpose of all life. The purpose of life is to end."

Neo gets back up and pulls himself together. He attacks Smith and they continue fighting. They continue until Smith punches Neo into the ground knocking him out. He comes to, with Smith standing over him.

"Everything that has a beginning has an end, Neo."

Neo then stands up and says, "You were right, Smith. You were always right. It was inevitable."

Smith then runs forward and infects Neo with his virus. It overwhelms him and turns him into another Smith.

"Is it over?" Smith questions the clone that used to be Neo. The clone nods confirming that they have won.

post_rendered:
The night was dark. The winds were not howling. All was silent. The sun had forgotten to risen, and the people had forgotten to wake.

HannahW sat up with a start, blinking. She was on the cold tile floor of a stereotypical grey control room lit only by flickering screens—except the screens didn't flicker. They stared back at her, blank and white. Although HannahW had no idea where she was nor what was happening nor what had happened, she did not have an existential crisis.

She got up, walked over to the nearest chair, and nearly tripped over the unconscious RTG who was in it. With a respectful half-nod, she passed by and sat in the next. No, she did not have time or need for existential questions. She was an Unpaid InternTM, and she had to get whatever needed to be done, done. Thus she proceeded.

The only problem was that she wasn't supposed to be an Unpaid InternTM in this particular scenario. She was on Unpaid LeaveTM for the time being, and she had taken up an apprenticeship under RTG the official Bad Game AbandonerTM. Perhaps the nature of RTG's position was infectious, for HannahW rapidly succumbed to forgetfulness and nonpresence. So no, she wasn't supposed to be an Unpaid InternTM but rather the Co-Bad Game AbandonerTM. Of course, though, that new position came with forgetfulness, and...

At any rate, HannahW did stuff. And stuff happened.

The night was not dark. Actually it wasn't night anymore.
The winds were not howling. All was silent. The sun had risen, and most people had probably started to wake.
Except one.

rosecasket (Oracle, also known as the Town Cop) is dead.
